original: The Steele Industries® CODEX™ system has been designed to provide emergency-level informative warnings of Class 4 environmental and Class M biological hazards to a designated user of the device and will notify the user should the CODEX™ device detect such a hazard within a defined unsafe radius.
translation: 斯蒂尔工业® 智典™ 系统旨在为指定用户提供紧急信息警告，针对4级环境危害与M级生物危害。一旦智典™ 设备在设定的不安全半径内检测到此类威胁，便会立即通知用户。
context: <<POS:18588362>> re® (CODEX™), version 12b.",e+='\\n\\nThe Steele Industries® CODEX™ system has been designed t'

original: System usability has been designed for rapid dissemination of information to the designated user when facing potentially life threatening situations. The following QuickStart™ documentation is always available from the CODEX™ root menu:
translation: 本系统旨在让指定用户面对潜在生命威胁时，能迅速获取关键信息。以下快速入门™文档，可随时从智典™根菜单调阅：

<style>
						.vibe_ani.vibe00 {
							transform-origin: 12px 21px;
							transform: rotate(0deg);
							animation-duration: 0.5s;
							animation-iteration-count: infinite;
							animation-name: ani_vibe_shake;
							animation-timing-function: linear;
						}
						.vibe_ani.vibe01, .vibe_ani.vibe02 {
							transform-origin: 12px 12px;
							animation-duration: 1s;
							animation-iteration-count: infinite;
							animation-name: ani_vibe_pulse;
							animation-timing-function: ease-in-out;
						}
						.vibe_ani.vibe01 { animation-delay: 0.2s; }
						.vibe_ani.vibe02 { animation-delay: 0.4s; }

						@keyframes ani_vibe_shake {
							0%  { transform: rotate(0deg); }
							20%  { transform: rotate(0deg); }
							40%  { transform: rotate(-5deg); }
							60%  { transform: rotate(5deg); }
							80%  { transform: rotate(0deg); }
							100%  { transform: rotate(0deg); }
						}
						@keyframes ani_vibe_pulse {
							20%  { opacity: 1; }
							40%  { opacity: 0; }
							60%  { opacity: 0; }
							80%  { opacity: 1; }
						}
					</style>

.ico_defeat_fade { opacity: 1; animation: ani_defeat_fade 1s ease 1; }\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t@keyframes ani_defeat_fade { 0% { opacity: 0; } 75% { opacity: 0; } 100% { opacity: 1; } }

<defs>
				<style>
					.ani_lock_pulse {
						animation: ani-lock_pulse 1.5s infinite;
					}
					@keyframes ani-lock_pulse {
						0% { transform: scale(0.95); }
						70% { transform: scale(1); }
						100% { transform: scale(0.95); }
					}
					.ani_lock_rattle {
						transform: rotate(0);
						animation: ani-lock_rattle 0.5s infinite;
					}
					@keyframes ani-lock_rattle {
						0% { transform: rotate(0deg); }
						12.5% { transform: rotate(-2.5deg); }
						37.5% { transform: rotate(5deg); }
						62.5% { transform: rotate(-5deg); }
						77.5% { transform: rotate(2.5deg); }
						100% { transform: rotate(0deg); }
					}
					.ani_lock_open .shank {
						transform: translate(0, -1px);
						animation: ani-lock_open_shank 0.5s ease-in-out 0s forwards;
					}
					@keyframes ani-lock_open_shank {
						0% { transform: translate(0, 0); }
						20% { transform: translate(0, 1px); }
						80% { transform: translate(0, -2px); }
						20% { transform: translate(0, -1px); }
						100% { transform: translate(0, -1px); }
					}
					.ani_lock_open .housing {
						transform: translate(0, 1px);
						animation: ani-lock_open_housing 0.5s ease-in-out 0s forwards;
					}
					@keyframes ani-lock_open_housing {
						0% { transform: translate(0, 0); }
						20% { transform: translate(0, 0); }
						80% { transform: translate(0, 1px); }
						100% { transform: translate(0, 1px); }
					}
				</style>
			</defs>

<defs>
				<style>
					.ani_lock_pulse {
						animation: ani-lock_pulse 1.5s infinite;
					}
					@keyframes ani-lock_pulse {
						0% { transform: scale(0.95); }
						70% { transform: scale(1); }
						100% { transform: scale(0.95); }
					}
					.ani_lock_rattle {
						transform: rotate(0);
						animation: ani-lock_rattle 0.5s infinite;
					}
					@keyframes ani-lock_rattle {
						0% { transform: rotate(0deg); }
						12.5% { transform: rotate(-2.5deg); }
						37.5% { transform: rotate(5deg); }
						62.5% { transform: rotate(-5deg); }
						77.5% { transform: rotate(2.5deg); }
						100% { transform: rotate(0deg); }
					}
					.ani_lock_open .housing {
						animation: ani-lock_open_housing 0.5s ease-in-out 0s forwards;
					}
					@keyframes ani-lock_open_housing {
						0% { transform: translate(0, 0); }
						20% { transform: translate(0, 0); }
						80% { transform: translate(0, 6px); }
						100% { transform: translate(0, 6px); }
					}
					.ani_lock_open .shank {
						animation: ani-lock_open_shank 0.5s ease-in-out 0s forwards;
					}
					@keyframes ani-lock_open_shank {
						0% { transform: translate(0, 0); }

						80% { transform: translate(0, -12px); }
						20% { transform: translate(0, -6px); }
						100% { transform: translate(0, -6px); }
					}
